sentence: Never skip brootball for a twousin who skipped yours.

wombos.definition: A cousin so close they might as well be your twin — a family member with the intimacy of a twin sibling. Related to brousin but emphasizing the twin-level bond rather than the bro bond.
Football viewed through a hyper-masculine, bro-culture lens — the sport as a social bonding ritual among bros.
wombos.example: Every Sunday they gather for brootball, snacks, and absolutely no emotional vulnerability.
